CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-29-2024 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-05-2024 Continued To Mar-27-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-01-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (In-person):
Timaima Yabaki, 415-760-5415 Plaintiff in Pro Per
Zuzana Ikels, Esq. 415-355-3307 Deputy City Attorney for Defendant.

Argued. The Court informs parties a contest email was never received. Ms. Yabaki confirms she did not send an email contesting the Court's tentative ruling. The Court announces the motion is uncontested and the case is over. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

The demurrer is unopposed and is sustained without leave to amend.

Order is signed.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/CK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2023 Continued To Jan-31-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
